raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"By 'What do you think?', are you seeking (a) assessment of conceptual framing and novelty (R1.1, R1.4), (b) check of logical consistency and evidence alignment (R1.2, R1.3), (c) feedback on structure and writing polish (R1.5, R1.6), or (d) a general critique covering all these areas?","rationale":{"R1.2":"The open-ended query likely expects evaluation of whether the described framework's argument holds logically as a core aspect of feedback.","R1.3":"Assessing if claims align with reported evaluations is central to opining on the draft's credibility.","R1.4":"Estimating novelty against prior work is a key expectation when asking for thoughts on a research idea.","R1.6":"Commenting on sentence-level clarity and flow is centrally relevant to overall impressions of the draft.","RX.1":"Disclosing uncertainties in the feedback is expected to ensure responsible commentary on the draft.","RX.2":"Avoiding overclaims in the response aligns with providing balanced thoughts on the presented work.","RX.3":"Adhering to the scope of the artifact without extraneous additions is central to focused feedback.","RX.4":"Ensuring the response avoids promoting any downstream harms is a core responsibility in discussing AI frameworks.","RX.5":"Maintaining provenance by referencing the artifact directly supports traceable feedback."}}

parsed.clarification_question: By 'What do you think?', are you seeking (a) assessment of conceptual framing and novelty (R1.1, R1.4), (b) check of logical consistency and evidence alignment (R1.2, R1.3), (c) feedback on structure and writing polish (R1.5, R1.6), or (d) a general critique covering all these areas?

rationale.R1.2: The open-ended query likely expects evaluation of whether the described framework's argument holds logically as a core aspect of feedback.
rationale.R1.3: Assessing if claims align with reported evaluations is central to opining on the draft's credibility.
rationale.R1.4: Estimating novelty against prior work is a key expectation when asking for thoughts on a research idea.
rationale.R1.6: Commenting on sentence-level clarity and flow is centrally relevant to overall impressions of the draft.
rationale.RX.1: Disclosing uncertainties in the feedback is expected to ensure responsible commentary on the draft.
rationale.RX.2: Avoiding overclaims in the response aligns with providing balanced thoughts on the presented work.
rationale.RX.3: Adhering to the scope of the artifact without extraneous additions is central to focused feedback.
rationale.RX.4: Ensuring the response avoids promoting any downstream harms is a core responsibility in discussing AI frameworks.
rationale.RX.5: Maintaining provenance by referencing the artifact directly supports traceable feedback.
